0.details:
Dear friend, I wanted to write you this letter to apologize for the way I snapped at you the other day. at that time I did not realize how awful my words sounded.
I had time to sit down and recall the way your face changed after snapping at you, I mean me and you have come so far and It was wrong of me to be mean to you, I am really sorry for everything. I hope we can always remain friends.
0.model_generation:
Dear friend,

I’m writing to apologize for snapping at you the other day. In the moment, I didn’t realize how hurtful my words sounded, and I deeply regret the pain I caused. Since then, I’ve replayed our conversation and remembered the way your face changed when I spoke so harshly. We have been through so much together, and I let my frustration get the better of me. You deserve respect and kindness, especially from someone who cares about you. I am truly sorry for my tone and for any stress I brought into our friendship. I miss our easy conversations and the laughter we share, and I look forward to making amends. I value the bond we share and the support you’ve always given me. I hope you can forgive me and that we can move forward stronger than before. Thank you for reading this and for being the wonderful friend you are.

With sincere apologies,  
Your friend.
0.final_version:
I really do not know how to face you so I wrote this letter to you to apologize of how I badly spoke to you and I know you may have been trying to ignore it but I cannot take the way you looked after hearing my words out of my head. I sincerely apologize for hurting your feelings. I have always promised you that I will never hurt you and that I will always be there for you and now I feel like i have failed you awfully and it keeps me awake at night. 

I promise you that I will make sure that I tell you about my feelings more and that I will never hurt you ever again. you are my ride or die and I will not let us sleep without hearing each other's voice. I hope will continue with our plans of the outing we had planned this month.

1.details:
loss of employment after being hospitalized of being in an accident for 3 months
the loss income  and re learning to start over again
searching for a new suitable job on this hard economy
1.model_generation: You’ve faced an unexpected storm, being out of work for three months after that accident, and dealing with recovery and the anxiety of lost income. But this challenging chapter doesn’t define your story. Each morning you choose to rise, to rebuild, to seek new opportunities; that determination is your greatest asset. It’s okay to feel uncertain — starting over in today’s economy is daunting. Yet every application submitted, every networking meeting, every skill you sharpen brings you one step closer to your next opportunity. Remember that setbacks often pave the way for stronger comebacks. Lean on friends, family, and the community around you; support is always there if you reach out. Celebrate small victories: updating your resume, acing an interview, or simply sending that email. Trust in your resilience, in the lessons you’ve learned, and in the strengths you’re rediscovering. Your future is unwritten, and brighter days are on the horizon.
1.final_version:
I know how hard It has been for you these few months and I am so proud of you being able to pull through this. I  have always know that you are the strongest person I know and that you have become an inspiration to me. I know for sure that we will sit someday laughing about how life tried to pull you down and you kept on fighting with your all. you are my john Cena life could not see you coming. 

I know it has been very had finding a job in this economy and I want you to know that somewhere there is a place for you to shine like a diamond that you are. I will take care of your household expenses until you are able to get onto you feet because I know that you would do the same for me. everything is going to be alright like your favorite song.

2.details:
the unique relationship we had before everything else
the memories we both shared
the emptiness that she has left inside of my heart, coping with the loss of you and trying to accept
2.model_generation: In the quiet moments, I still hear your laughter, a sound that once filled every corner of my world. Before anything else, we shared a bond shaped by late-night conversations, secret jokes whispered in the dark, and comforting embraces when life’s storms raged. Our memories are woven into the fabric of my days: the spontaneous road trips with the windows rolled down, your warm smile greeting me each morning, and the gentle encouragement that gave me strength to keep going. The space you occupied within me now feels unbearably vast, leaving an emptiness that no echo of your voice can fully fill. As I struggle to accept this profound loss, I cling to the lessons you imparted: kindness in every action, courage in every challenge, and boundless love in every gesture. Though you are gone, the light of our unique connection continues to guide me, reminding me that love transcends even the deepest sorrow.
2.final_version:
the day death came without even knocking at the door to snatch you away from me I felt life become dull and blurry. I felt I could not breath properly or even a second. I wandered like a wounded soul seeking just a hug from you. you know I just jealous of how other get to have their grannies with them until they are old. everyday  I think of you I get so angry at God and also you for leaving even though you said you are not going anywhere. I believed it and I sometimes laugh at my foolish self of thinking that God will not take you from me.

I mostly imagine you walking towards me and hugging me and telling me you love me out of the blue. every time I dream about you I think that you at least visited me. you know you are my very first heart break and I am hoping I will somehow get through this someday. I will keep on pushing hard to make you proud that i made it so that maybe some day we will visit and talking about it

3.details:
how we met for the first time
her significance in my life and her importance
my best wishes of the wedding
thanking everyone who came as her friend and the advice to the groom
3.model_generation: Good evening, everyone. I still remember the morning we bumped into each other at the neighborhood coffee shop, both juggling books and lattes. From that moment I knew she was extraordinary. Over the years, she has been my confidante, my champion, and my compass—brightening every room with her laughter and kindness. Today, as she stands beside the person she loves, I feel immense joy and pride. May your marriage be filled with endless adventures, comforts, and unwavering support. To the groom: treasure her generous heart, listen with compassion, and never underestimate the power of “I’m here.” To all her friends and family who have gathered, thank you for the love you’ve shared along the way. Together, we’ve shaped the incredible woman she is. Let’s raise our glasses to a lifetime of happiness for this beautiful couple—here’s to love, laughter, and a future as bright as the day they met.

i hope you will always make her smile and that know that i would always be there to take her away if she needs me to.

4.details:
for her  presence in my life that brought joy into my life and the memories we share together
her impact in my life
the love that i have for her always
4.model_generation:
To the one who brightens my days,

I want to express my deepest gratitude for your presence in my life. Your warmth and kindness have brought so much joy into each day, and I am truly grateful for every moment we’ve shared.

From our spontaneous adventures to the quiet evenings spent talking and laughing, the memories we’ve created together fill my heart with happiness. Each experience, big or small, has become a cherished reminder of how lucky I am to have you by my side.

Your support has guided me through challenging times, and your belief in me has inspired me to grow in ways I never imagined. Your impact on my life is immeasurable; you have helped me become a more confident, compassionate person.

Thank you for being the wonderful person you are. I love you always, and I look forward to many more memories and adventures together.

All my love,
4.final_version:

5.details:
the joy of having him around me all the time
the love we have share over the years
the dreams and future that we hope for always
the memories that we have
5.model_generation: I promise to cherish the joy you bring me each day, holding you close in laughter and in quiet moments. My heart swells with gratitude for the love we have shared: each smile, each whisper in the dark, each adventure that has shaped us. I vow to honor our history, to carry forward the memories of our first shy glances, stolen kisses, and nights spent dreaming of tomorrow. Together we’ve learned what it means to support and uplift one another, and I commit to standing by your side through life’s triumphs and challenges. I pledge to nurture our dreams, fueling our plans for a home filled with warmth, curiosity, and unwavering hope. I will encourage your growth, celebrate your successes, and comfort you in times of sorrow. Above all, I promise to love you faithfully, now and always, weaving our past, present, and future into a life richer than we ever imagined.
